raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint against Citibank, N.A ( Citicards CBNA ). for violations of the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ) and Fair Credit Reporting Act ( FCRA ) in connection with a fraud dispute on my credit card account. 

In XX/XX/XXXX, I reported a fraudulent charge to Citibank and requested my account ending in XXXX to be closed permanently. The charge in question was posted on XX/XX/XXXX for {$49.00} related to XXXX XXXX and a security credit was posted on XX/XX/XXXX for {$49.00} as evidence of the investigation start. Additionally, Citibank issued a new credit card account ending in XXXX, which was never activated. Under the FCBA, they were required to complete the investigation within 90 days. However, they failed to do so. 

In XX/XX/XXXX, while the investigation was still pending, Citibank reported the disputed balance along with all related late fees and interest charges in the total amount of {$160.00} as delinquent to credit reporting agencies, which is a violation of 15 U.S.C. 1666a ( a ) ( FCBA ) and 15 U.S.C. 1681s-2 ( a ) ( 3 ) ( FCRA ). I suffered a credit score drop for over XXXX points and was denied credit as a result. 

In XX/XX/XXXX Citibank concluded the investigation in my favor and permanently reversed the fraudulent charge of {$49.00} with a security credit posted on XX/XX/XXXX as shown in the XX/XX/XXXX statement. Furthermore, all related late fees and interest charges were reversed for a total reversed amount of {$160.00}, resulting in a final balance of {$0.00} in the account as shown in the XX/XX/XXXX statement. The account was also permanently closed at that point.

I have contacted Citibank multiple times requesting that they correct the inaccurate reporting and remove the delinquent status with the credit agencies. However, Citibank has refused to correct the negative credit reporting as evidenced by their letter dated XX/XX/XXXX. The delinquency remains on my credit report, despite the bank acknowledging that the charges were fraudulent. I was denied credit as a result as evidenced by the credit denial letter dated XX/XX/XXXX.
